message.content:
@startuml
skinparam UMLSequenceDiagram {
    style Actor
    style Interface
    style Database
}

actor "bibliotecario" as actor1
actor "bibliotecario" as actor2
interface "InterfazBiblioteca" as interface1
interface "InterfazBiblioteca" as interface2
actor "Api" as api1
actor "Api" as api2
database "Mongo" as mongo1
database "Mongo" as mongo2

actor1 -> interface1: 1 Peticion para eliminar recurso
interface1 -> api1: 2 Redirecciona peticion a api
api1 -> mongo1: 3 consulta recurso y lo elimina
mongo1 -> api1: 4 Envia mensaje HTTP de aceptacion o error
api1 -> interface2: 5 Envia mensaje
interface2 -> actor2: 6 recibe mensaje

@enduml
